github_surges.description: Build digital human beings — autonomous, collaborative, and socially intelligent agents.
Give your AI agent eyes and hands on iOS Simulator and Android emulator/devices.
Agent behavior clone for browser using, targeting general GUI using and distributed trajectory collecting.

claude mythos ai anthropic free large language model llm frontier model project glasswing cybersecurity agent vulnerability research software engineering agentic workflows multi step reasoning recurrent depth transformer rdt openmythos repository open source claude fable 5 multi agent
Living project docs for coding agents: keep guides, progress logs, change maps, and handoff context updated as your repo evolves.
PhysisForcing: Physics Reinforced World Simulator for Robotic Manipulation
A curated, non-BS library of the best resources for building and evaluating AI agents — papers, blogs, talks, tools, benchmarks. Maintained by BenchFlow.
Open-source @agent mentions for Slack and GitHub. OpenTag routes tagged requests to Codex, Claude Code, then returns results in thread.
Sovereign LLM/RAG reference architecture: open-weight models for regulated document workloads, benchmarked self-hosted vs Amazon Bedrock vs the frontier. Synthetic data, reproducible, in-VPC.
Browser-native side panel for Hermes Agent — connect web context to your local Hermes runtime.

caveats: 生产报告仅使用真实抓取数据；没有 API Key 时增强源会自动降级。
